mapper.select: SELECT g.id, g.title, g.tag, LEFT(g.content, 100) AS content, g.good_count AS goodCount, g.middle_count AS middleCount, g.bad_count AS badCount, g.user_name AS userName FROM osh_info_gap g WHERE g.status = 2 AND g.delete_flag = 0 ORDER BY (0.55 * IFNULL(LN(1 + IFNULL(g.good_count, 0)) / NULLIF((SELECT MAX(LN(1 + IFNULL(x.good_count, 0))) FROM osh_info_gap x WHERE x.status = 2 AND x.delete_flag = 0), 0), 0) + 0.25 * IFNULL(LN(1 + IFNULL(g.view_count, 0)) / NULLIF((SELECT MAX(LN(1 + IFNULL(x.view_count, 0))) FROM osh_info_gap x WHERE x.status = 2 AND x.delete_flag = 0), 0), 0) + 0.20 * IFNULL(LN(1 + IFNULL(g.collect_count, 0)) / NULLIF((SELECT MAX(LN(1 + IFNULL(x.collect_count, 0))) FROM osh_info_gap x WHERE x.status = 2 AND x.delete_flag = 0), 0), 0)) * CASE WHEN TIMESTAMPDIFF(DAY, g.create_time, NOW()) <= 7 THEN 1.30 WHEN TIMESTAMPDIFF(DAY, g.create_time, NOW()) <= 30 THEN 1.10 WHEN TIMESTAMPDIFF(DAY, g.create_time, NOW()) <= 90 THEN 0.90 ELSE 0.70 END DESC, g.create_time DESC LIMIT #{limit}
